summary: Frontend refactoring verification complete. All three refactored pages (DepositsPage, ParkingPage, NotificationsPage) load correctly and all extracted components are working properly. The refactoring was successful - no functionality was broken.
passed_tests: DepositsPage: Page loads with data-testid='deposits-page'
DepositsPage: 3 tabs visible (Current Deposits, Past Deposits, Landlord Deposits)
DepositsPage: Current Deposits tab shows deposit table with data ($5,000 total)
DepositsPage: Edit deposit button opens EditDepositDialog component
DepositsPage: Return deposit button opens ReturnDepositDialog component
DepositsPage: Past Deposits tab navigates correctly
DepositsPage: Landlord Deposits tab shows landlord total ($999)
ParkingPage: Page loads with title 'Parking' (data-testid='parking-page-title')
ParkingPage: 2 tabs visible (Parking Info, Tenant Assignments)
ParkingPage: Parking Info tab shows SpotCard components
ParkingPage: Add Parking Space button opens SpotDialog component
ParkingPage: SpotDialog type toggle switches between Designated/Marlins Decal
ParkingPage: Tenant Assignments tab shows AssignmentsTab component with groups
ParkingPage: Assignment groups expand/collapse correctly
NotificationsPage: Page loads with title 'Notifications & Tasks'
NotificationsPage: Kanban/List view toggle works
NotificationsPage: KanbanView component shows 5 status columns (upcoming, in_progress, done, reassigned, archived)
NotificationsPage: ListView component shows sortable table
NotificationsPage: Add button opens NotificationFormDialog with all fields
NotificationsPage: Search input works
NotificationsPage: Filter toggle shows filter panel
NotificationsPage: Bulk actions bar appears when items selected
NotificationsPage: SnoozeDialog component opens from card actions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend refactoring of DepositsPage, ParkingPage, and NotificationsPage was verified. All extracted components are working correctly. Navigation: Deposits is under Budgeting menu, Parking is under Info menu, Notifications is a direct sidebar link.
